vendors.name: Seven Springs Mountain Resort
vendors.notes: Champion, PA. Picked! Ceremony $3,000 + reception $3,000, included in a $21,599 venue & food total (tax and tip included). In-house catering, ~$175/pp top-tier package. Cocktail bar included. Tables/chairs provided. Candles allowed. No Friday discount. Toured 8/20/2025 — rated 9/10 by both of us.

vendors.name: Carnegie Museum
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Runner-up. Toured 8/23/2025. Approx. $25,000 (exact figure unclear). In-house catering, on-site suite, no candles, Friday discount available. Rated 8.5/10 by both of us.

vendors.name: Hartwood Acres Mansion
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Toured 8/21/2025. Reception $4,500 (ceremony included). Outside catering required — $50 alcohol permit, must supply own bartenders/alcohol. Tables/chairs and on-site suite included. Friday discount ~$3,500. Rated 6/10 (Nikki), 5/10 (Cody).

vendors.name: Hartwood Stables
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Toured 8/21/2025. Reception $3,600 (ceremony included). Outside catering — same $50 permit/bartender rules as Hartwood Acres. Rated 6/10 (Nikki), 5/10 (Cody).

vendors.name: National Aviary
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Toured 8/21/2025. Ceremony $750 + reception $5,950. Total ~$16,674.54 including cake and cookie table. In-house catering, candles allowed. Rated 4/10 by both of us.

vendors.name: Springwood
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Toured 8/11/2025. Ceremony $3,500, reception ~$188/pp x 65 guests. Roughly $18,000 total. In-house catering under 100 guests, $3,500 facility fee. BYOB with their bartenders. Tables/chairs and on-site suite included. Rated 7/10 (Nikki), 6/10 (Cody).

vendors.name: The Frick Museum
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Toured 8/11/2025. Ceremony only, $3,000 (would only host the ceremony here). Outside catering, venue rental only. Tables/chairs included. Rated 8.5/10 (Nikki), 6.5/10 (Cody).

vendors.name: Succop Nature Park
vendors.notes: Butler, PA. Toured 8/10/2025. ~$11,325 total (ceremony + reception, buffet included). BYOB, venue provides nothing else. Tables/chairs and on-site suite included. $1,000 deposit. Candles allowed. Rated 6.5/10 (Nikki), 5/10 (Cody).

vendors.name: The Lake House
vendors.notes: Finger Lakes, NY. Inquired, no tour scheduled. Ceremony $3,500, reception $25,000. Catering minimum noted as $50,000 (as recorded in original research).

vendors.name: Pittsburgh Botanic Garden
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired. Reception $7,000. In-house catering (choice of 7 vendors), ~$45/pp. Tables/chairs and 3-hour on-site suite included. $750 deposit.

vendors.name: Heinz History Center
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired. Ceremony $1,500-3,000; whole-facility rental up to $10,000. Catering minimum $20,000. 3-hour on-site suite. Deposit is 50% of rental amount. Candles allowed.

vendors.name: Kimpton Hotel Monaco
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired. Ceremony $3,000; reception tied to a $28,000 F&B minimum.

vendors.name: Mansions on Fifth
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired — never got back to us.

vendors.name: The Pennsylvanian
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired. Reception $9,250. 50% deposit. Friday discount available.

vendors.name: New Hazlett Theater
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired — no further details gathered yet.

vendors.name: LeMont
vendors.notes: Pittsburgh, PA. Inquired. In-house catering, ~$109/pp. Tables/chairs included. Friday discount available.

vendors.name: Samantha Taylor
vendors.notes: 10 hours, 2 photographers, 1-hour engagement session included.

vendors.name: Taylor Ollason
vendors.notes: Avg. $5,500 — website doesn't list what's included. Style comparable to Londynnkate's.

vendors.name: Nadine
vendors.notes: 8 hours, 800+ edited photos. Additional hours $300 each.

vendors.name: Londynnkate
vendors.notes: Picked! 8 hours, 2 photographers, complimentary engagement session, extra hour +$500. Want to add an hour and still need to confirm the engagement shoot.

vendors.name: Adam Michaels
vendors.notes: 2 photographers, engagement session, 850+ edited photos, unlimited coverage (getting ready through reception). Also offers 'Jade's unlimited package' at $4,750 with similar inclusions.

vendors.name: Wild North
vendors.notes: 10 hours, 2 photographers, complimentary bonus hour. Under consideration.

vendors.name: Kate Marodi
vendors.notes: Runner-up. 6-11 hours, 2 photographers, complimentary engagement session, timeline planning, 600-1400 photos. Range $3,300-$4,500.

vendors.name: Kelly Zavolta
vendors.notes: Starting at $3,900. Under consideration.

vendors.name: Zimmerman Video
vendors.notes: 3-5 min film, social recap reel, full ceremony, full dances/speeches, delivered within 3 months. Noted as expensive.

vendors.name: The Blue House Media
vendors.notes: 2 filmmakers, 8 hrs coverage, drone, 5-8 min film, full ceremony + speeches, preview within a week.

vendors.name: Logans Light Room
vendors.notes: Begins at $4,000. No further info listed on website.

vendors.name: Flower and Oak
vendors.notes: Cinematic collection: 1 videographer, 8 hrs, 5-min film — $3,550. Premiere collection: 2 videographers, 10 hrs, 10-min film — $4,950.

vendors.name: The Wild Roses Co
vendors.notes: 8 hrs, ceremony + reception coverage. Website is vague on specifics.

vendors.name: Wiley Weddings
vendors.notes: No price listed on website — requires direct inquiry.

vendors.name: Valerie Stofko Film
vendors.notes: 10 hrs, 1 videographer, drone, 6-13 min film, 30-sec trailer, all raw footage, full ceremony, 2 edited speeches. $4,450 or $4,650 tier. Really like her work. Opens 2027 books May 1st. Inquired 5/4/2026, confirmed available 5/11/2026.

vendors.name: Pgh Florist
vendors.notes: Loved their arrangements. Emailed 5/14/2026 wanting to book. Design meeting scheduled 5/30/2026 to discuss vision.

vendors.name: Linda Brown
vendors.notes: Expensive compared to other options considered.

vendors.name: Loyalty Entertainment
vendors.notes: DJ quote. 7 hrs of service, Legend collection $2,495, ceremony/cocktail package included, 16 uplights. Cold sparks add-on +$500.

vendors.name: S2N
vendors.notes: DJ, booked. 4 hrs of service, 'The Entertainment Experience' base package $2,100. Add-ons under consideration: cold sparks (2) $500, cold sparks (4) $800, uplighting (20) $500, media DJ booth $500. Phone call 11/12/2025. Next payment due 4/25/2027 (amount TBD) — remember to add cold sparks to the contract if we go with them.

vendors.name: Steven Vance
vendors.notes: Under consideration for DJ and/or live music (violin). DJ+violin combo packages $1,695-$1,995 (premium electric violin $1,595-$1,895; traditional acoustic $1,495-$1,795). Live-music-only first-hour pricing: solo violin $295-$375, electric violin $395-$995. Most likely direction is live music specifically rather than DJ.

vendors.name: Innocenti Strings
vendors.notes: Live music (strings) — no pricing gathered yet.

vendors.name: Three Rivers String Quartet
vendors.notes: Live music — ceremony & cocktail hour (2 hrs), $1,645 including travel fees. Like the price and package. Inquired 2/4/2026. Asked for a contract 2/9/2026; 50% deposit required to hold the date.

vendors.name: Beauty by Brooke
vendors.notes: Makeup, booked. $175 wedding day / $130 trial / $130 per bridal party member. 20-mile roundtrip travel included. Texted 11/3 for a trial. Trial run 12/29 @ 12pm — loved the look; testing a stronger setting spray and a different foundation/airbrush mix for future trials.

vendors.name: Dangerously Beautiful by AK
vendors.notes: Makeup. $250 wedding day / $175 trial / $125 per bridal party member, ~$100 avg travel fee. 9/25/27 was open as of inquiry. Filled out inquiry form 11/3. Trial run 11/28 @ 12pm — loved eyes/base, she offered to waive the travel fee. Would change for the real day: lighter brow shade, less cheek contour, no under-eye shadow, different lip color.

vendors.name: Shannon Cole Makeup
vendors.notes: Makeup — no pricing gathered yet.

vendors.name: Emma Noelle Beauty
vendors.notes: Hair. $175 wedding day / $125 trial (2-hr consult, 3 styles) / $125 per bridal party member. $0.50/mile travel from zip 15090. 2027 bookings weren't open yet as of inquiry.

vendors.name: Simply Captivating Pgh Hair
vendors.notes: Hair, booked. $1,278 total, travel fee may apply. Must book stylist Amelia a hotel room by March 2027. Joined waitlist 11/11/25; 2027 books opened Mon 1/19/26 9am EST.

vendors.name: Tease Salon (Shari)
vendors.notes: Hair. $140 wedding day / $90 bridesmaid / $90 mother updo. Wouldn't do a trial without locking in first, so went with Simply Captivating instead.

vendors.name: Glam Booth
vendors.notes: Photobooth. Price not listed. Inquired 11/18/2025 — can't make the drive out due to another wedding in Pittsburgh that day.

vendors.name: Loyalty Entertainment (Photobooth)
vendors.notes: Photobooth quote — same company being considered separately for DJ services (see Music category). Add-ons: unlimited 4x6 prints +$300, unlimited 2x6 prints +$300.

vendors.name: Expose Photo Booth Co
vendors.notes: Photobooth, booked. Paid via Venmo.
